notes: Three.js via importmap CDN (r160) + EffectComposer UnrealBloom + OutputPass. Four STYLIZED humanoid dancers (colour-coded: red-jacket lead, green frog-motif, gold power-suit, blue tech-suit) — NOT depictions of real individuals, per responsible-output guidance. Rigged capsule figures with 8-beat keyframed Thriller-inspired choreography (ready, claw, lunges, hip-pop, zombie-reach, turn-point, crouch), smoothstepped + looped. Cinematic spotlights, fog/haze, drifting motes, glossy reflective stage, ACES tone mapping, auto-cinematic camera + orbit controls, optional synthesized beat (off by default).
